description: Capability for thin detached windows (labels matching `detached-*`) — the single-surface Flavor-C windows from plans/multi-window. Loaded from the same localhost app URL as `main`. SCOPE OF THIS FILE: the Tauri ACL `permissions` array gates only PLUGIN + core commands, so withholding `sql:allow-execute`, `stronghold`, `dialog`, and `shell` here blocks the `@tauri-apps/plugin-*` JS paths for those plugins. IMPORTANT — this is NOT a containment boundary for the app's own `#[tauri::command]`s (secrets_*, db_exec, pty_*, supabase_config_*, fs_write, etc.): Tauri's ACL does not gate custom commands, so a detached window has the same custom-command reach as `main`. Real per-window restriction of those must be enforced IN the command (inject `tauri::WebviewWindow` + reject non-privileged labels), tracked as a follow-up — do not rely on this file for it. The granted plugin perms are kept minimal (core IPC + event bus + read-only `sql:allow-select`/`allow-load`) as defense-in-depth.
